Home Bookshelf Writing

Bookshelf

The books I own or remember reading at some point, in no particular order. If I haven't read it yet, the subtitle and author are not included. For the ones where I recall, I've also included who I heard about the book from. I also have a list of links to other reading lists I follow at the end.

  • The Dappled World: A Study of the Boundaries of Science (Natalie Cartwright)
  • The Divide: Global Inequality from Conquest to Free Markets (Jason Hickel)Recommended by Jay Mathuri
  • Sapiens: A Brief History of Humankind (Yuval Noah Harari)
  • Outlive: The Science and Art of Longevity (Peter Attia)
  • Pioneering Portfolio Management: An Unconventional Approach to Institutional Investment (David F. Swensen)
  • A More Beautiful and Terrible History: The Uses and Misuses of Civil Rights History (Jeanne Theoharis)Recommended by Jim Campbell
  • Man's Search for Meaning (Victor Frankl)
  • What is Life? (Erwin Schrödinger)
  • The Structure of Scientific Revolutions (Thomas S. Kuhn)
  • In Struggle: SNCC and the Black Awakening of the 1960s (Clayborne Carson)Recommended by Jim Campbell
  • Kochland: The Secret Hisotry of Koch Industries and Corporate Power in America (Christopher Leonard)Recommended by Vincent Song
  • Vagabonding (Rolf Potts)Recommended by Tim Ferris
  • The Art of Doing Science and Engineering: Learning to Learn (Richard W. Hamming)Recommended by Patrick Collison
  • The Rise and Fall of Modern MedicineRecommended by Patrick Collison
  • The Autobiography of Benjamin Franklin (Big Ben)Recommended by Charlie Munger
  • EdisonRecommended by David Senra
  • Endless FrontierRecommended by David Senra
  • The Intel TrinityRecommended by David Senra
  • How to Win Freinds and Influence People
  • A Short Hostory of Chinese Philosophy: A Systematic Account of Chinese Thought from Its Origins to the Present Day (Fung Yu-Lan)
  • The Profiteers
  • The Count of Monte CristoRecommended by Chris Fizer
  • A Critical Survey of Indian Philosophy (Chandradhar Sharma)Recommended by Vikas Divyakirti
  • Sophie's WorldRecommended by Vikas Divyakirti
  • The Age of Insight (Eric R. Kandel)Recommended by Wei Ouyang
